mapper.select: SELECT id, username, password, email, name, phone, role, status, create_time, update_time FROM user WHERE username = #{username} AND password = #{password} AND status = 'active'
SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM user WHERE username = #{username}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user (username, password, email, name, phone, role, status, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{username}, #{password}, #{email}, #{name}, #{phone}, #{role}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE user SET username = #{username}, password = #{password}, email = #{email}, name = #{name}, phone = #{phone}, role = #{role}, status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, username, password, email, name, phone, role, status, create_time, update_time FROM user ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user WHERE status = 'active'
